title: Replace logo with uploaded retro book store image across all pages

requirements.summary: Save the uploaded retro book store logo PNG to frontend/public/assets/generated/book-store-logo.png and replace all existing logo image sources in Navigation (desktop and mobile), Footer, ProfileSetupModal, BooksPage hero, and the favicon
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded retro book store logo PNG is saved to frontend/public/assets/generated/book-store-logo.png.
Navigation component displays the new logo on both desktop header and mobile Sheet menu, replacing any previous logo.
Footer component displays the new logo, replacing any previous logo.
ProfileSetupModal displays the new logo, replacing any previous logo.
BooksPage displays the new logo wherever the previous logo appeared.
No instance of the old logo image remains visible anywhere in the app.
The favicon in frontend/index.html is updated to reference the new logo asset.

file_operations.description: Save the uploaded Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_180351_0000-removebg-preview.png as book-store-logo.png in the generated assets directory for use throughout the app
Replace the current logo image source with /assets/generated/book-store-logo.png in both the desktop navigation header and the mobile Sheet menu logo display
Replace the current logo image source with /assets/generated/book-store-logo.png in the footer component
Replace the current logo image source with /assets/generated/book-store-logo.png in the profile setup modal header
Replace any logo image sources in the hero banner or elsewhere on BooksPage with /assets/generated/book-store-logo.png
Update the favicon link tag to reference /assets/generated/book-store-logo.png instead of the current favicon path
